_comment: Canonical RO Classic / pre-renewal NPC service fees. Sources: iRO Wiki Kafra, RMS shops, rAthena npc/ scripts.

kafra._storage_note: Most rAthena scripts use 60z. Some private servers use 0-100z.
kafra._cart_note: Original RO charged 800z for all classes.

prontera._note: Aldebaran teleport is FREE from Prontera Kafra.

kafra_teleport_costs._note: All Kafra teleport prices are subject to Discount skill (Merchant) reductions when player has it.

weight_thresholds._regen_note: At 50% weight, natural HP/SP regen stops.
weight_thresholds._attacks_note: At 90% weight, cannot attack or use skills (movement only).

vending._note: Items priced above 10M zeny incur 5% vendor tax (sink).

_exp_loss_note: Pre-renewal: lose 1% of base EXP needed for current level on death. Novice/Super Novice exempt.
